tables.title: Chemical Agent Classes
rows: Cholinergic toxidrome: SLUDGE/DUMBELS, miosis, twitching, seizures, apnea
Decon; atropine (titrate to secretions) + pralidoxime; benzodiazepines
Skin/eye/airway blistering; mustard effects DELAYED hours
Decon; supportive care (no antidote for mustard)
Airway irritation → pulmonary edema; phosgene classically delayed
Remove from exposure; oxygen; observation; supportive
Rapid collapse, seizures, arrest; SpO2 may look normal

tables.title: Scene Zones at a Hazmat/Chemical Event
Cholinergic Toxidrome Mnemonics
rows: Salivation, Lacrimation, Urination, Defecation, GI distress, Emesis
Defecation, Urination, Miosis, Bronchorrhea/Bronchospasm, Emesis, Lacrimation, Salivation
